todos.content: Check Tavily CLI status (tvly --status) to ensure authenticated
Find the Parliament of Sri Lanka MPs directory page and list URLs (use tvly map/search)
Extract the first 50 MP profile URLs and scrape required fields using tvly extract/crawl
Generate CSV, Markdown, JSON, and sources.txt under /_outputs/parliament_task_output/
Deliver file paths and one-line summary to user
